quote: Really great toy doctor! She can repair all sorts of electronic devices. Helped me with a TV remote, clock and pepper grinder. I found she is highly educated in electronic engineering with experience in Hong Kong and Australia. She is keen on rescuing electronic stuff — I highly recommend trying here before sending things to the bin.
I'm so glad I found this Toy Doctor — what a great service. She fixed my old portable CD/DVD player; the volume was broken and I wouldn't be able to replace it. Now it's working thanks to her.
